% Two-column for everything. Same as aic2026/pdf: longtable -> scriptsize
% tabular in center; toprule/midrule/bottomrule swallow \noalign{} and become \hline.
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{epstopdf}
\usepackage{float}
\renewenvironment{longtable}{\begin{center}\scriptsize\begin{tabular}}{\end{tabular}\end{center}}
\renewcommand{\endhead}{}
\renewcommand{\endfirsthead}{}
\def\endlastfoot{\hspace{0mm}}
\renewcommand{\toprule}[2]{\hline}
\renewcommand{\midrule}[2]{\hline}
\renewcommand{\bottomrule}[2]{\hline}

% Allow underscore _ in text (e.g. V_CTAT) so it does not trigger math mode
\IfFileExists{underscore.sty}{\usepackage{underscore}}{}

% Figures: wrap in figure[H], constrain size to column.
% Defer to AtBeginDocument so pandoc's \pandocbounded is already defined.
\AtBeginDocument{%
\makeatletter
\setkeys{Gin}{width=\columnwidth,height=0.5\textheight,keepaspectratio}
\renewcommand*\pandocbounded[1]{%
  \begin{figure}[H]
  \centering
  \sbox\pandoc@box{#1}%
  \Gscale@div\@tempa{0.5\textheight}{\dimexpr\ht\pandoc@box+\dp\pandoc@box\relax}%
  \Gscale@div\@tempb{\dimexpr\columnwidth-4pt}{\wd\pandoc@box}%
  \ifdim\@tempb\p@<\@tempa\p@\let\@tempa\@tempb\fi%
  \ifdim\@tempa\p@<\p@\scalebox{\@tempa}{\usebox\pandoc@box}%
  \else\usebox{\pandoc@box}%
  \fi%
  \end{figure}
}
\makeatother
}
